text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head to a sports store to take<n>advantage of a
sale.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's a crowd of Umamusume<n>lined up in
front, eagerly awaiting the<n>store's opening.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time! I won't let anyone<n>steal my
deals!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the invite, Ines! Let's do<n>this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Those super cute—I mean,advanced shoes I've beeneyeing will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're going to fight over those<n>deals, right? I'll
join in and win too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the eagerly awaited (for<n>different
reasons) sale begins...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yoink!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This one's mine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Customers pour in, and the store<n>turns into a
battleground. Ines Fujin is<n>fearless in the thick of
the fray.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huff, huff... This is harder than I<n>thought. We
need to retreat for now!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that was so fun! It felt like a super<n>close
race! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uh, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay—nice job, everyone! Did you all<n>get what
you wanted?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No. It was a bloodbath for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Fine... I don't think<n>she was
even looking for anything<n>specific. She just went
for anything<n>she saw.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I wanted was to have<n>fun! ♪ And I
got loads of it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Ines! You made out like a<n>bandit! Is all that
on the bench your<n>loot?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, well, I'm a pro at this! Like—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Half off frozen foods?! I can't miss<n>this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If I buy a bunch now, we'll have<n>plenty of easy
dinner options for a<n>long time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. The Twinkle ☆ Wand, huh? So<n>that's what
you want.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll go and buy one for you!<n>I've still got
plenty of money this<n>month. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(The holiday sale will have some stiff<n>
competition, but they don't stand a<n>chance
against me!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've been bargain hunting for my<n>parents and
little sisters for years!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Sometimes Ines still rushes out<n>when she
hears about a sale going<n>on.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that's cute. ♪ I guess you owe<n>some of your
racing speed to your<n>shopping habits!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, guess so!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Ryan, you wanted those cute<n>shoes,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What?! How did you know?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm great at reading people! ♪ Here,<n>I'll go get
them for you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Ines, wait! I wanna go bargain<n>hunting too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Didn't know being a big sister<n>gave you
psychic abilities.
